channel.title: Oracle Bull — AI Crypto Predictions & Market Analysis
channel.description: Daily AI-powered cryptocurrency market recaps, price predictions, and analysis for Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, and 300+ tokens.

item.title: Crypto Market Recap — Daily Summary
item.description: Daily crypto market summary with total market cap, BTC dominance, top gainers and losers, Fear & Greed Index, and AI-powered analysis. Updated every day.

item.title: What Happened to Bitcoin Today — Daily Update
item.description: Live Bitcoin (BTC) daily update with AI price prediction, support and resistance levels, trading setup, and market analysis.
